description_long: This object is a stylized shotgun with a wooden grip and stock, featuring metallic gold and silver components. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a metallic finish and a decorative gold element running along its underside. The receiver and trigger area are robust, with intricate gold mechanisms and a prominent hammer. The grip is ergonomically shaped, made of polished wood, and capped with a gold butt plate. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, matching the gold accents throughout the weapon. The overall design blends classic flintlock aesthetics with modern embellishments, making it visually striking and ornate.
description: A stylized shotgun with a polished wooden grip, gold metallic accents, and a long silver barrel, featuring ornate mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden grip, gold trigger guard, and detailed gold mechanisms above the trigger.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden grip and gold butt plate, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, gold accents, and the full length of the silver barrel with decorative elements.
description_view_3: Front view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the gold and silver components.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with decorative gold ribbing underneath
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth gold finish and no visible finger grooves
